mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_member (member_id, password, nickname, email, role, join_type) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{role}, #{joinType})
mapper.select: SELECT member_id AS "memberId", password, nickname, email, role, join_type AS "joinType", reg_date AS "regDate" FROM t_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT member_id AS "memberId", password, nickname, email, role, join_type AS "joinType", reg_date AS "regDate" FROM t_member
AND (member_id LIKE '%' || #{_parameter} || '%' OR nickname LIKE '%' || #{_parameter} || '%')
ORDER BY reg_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_member SET role = #{role} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE t_member SET face_descriptor = #{faceDescriptor} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT member_id AS "memberId", nickname, face_descriptor AS "faceDescriptor" FROM t_member WHERE face_descriptor IS NOT NULL
